query: SELECT COLUMN_NAME FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'signals' AND TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE(); SELECT DATE_FORMAT(published_at, '%Y-%m') as period, COUNT(*) as count FROM signals GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(published_at, '%Y-%m') ORDER BY period DESC LIMIT 30;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2aGV9vQqnMXZ7WH.b5ed6992562a --database 43iZsmPphrqUoXjRK5zrxR --execute SELECT COLUMN_NAME FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'signals' AND TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE(); SELECT DATE_FORMAT(published_at, '%Y-%m') as period, COUNT(*) as count FROM signals GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(published_at, '%Y-%m') ORDER BY period DESC LIMIT 30;
